# Sonic Measurement

**Summary**: A method to measure P and S wave velocities to determine elastic moduli.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-serag|SERAG, 2021]] used sonic measurement to determine the rock's elastic properties (Young's modulus and Poisson's ratio).

## Key Results and Findings

- Vp increased by 17% and Vs by 6% when overbalance pressure was increased from 300 to 1000 psi. ([[2021-serag|SERAG, 2021, p. 136]])
